Just to rub in the petrol crisis…

Our local shops just had three EV chargers installed.

BP Pulse: 72c per Kwatt - which makes it cost about $12 per 100km driven.

I pay less for Tesla (59c usually).

Our round trip to Sydney costs $20 in electricity, starting with a full charge at home via solar.
